summary: Iteration 6 Testing Complete - All new UI/UX features for Transfer Method and Withdraw Destination verified. Backend minimum amount validation (Rp 10,000) working. Frontend method picker modal with bank/e-wallet logos, fees, and ETAs all functional.
seed_data_creation: None new - using existing test user
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 6 features all working: Method picker modal with card-style items, logos (BCA, BNI, Mandiri, BRI, CIMB Niaga, Permata, GoPay, OVO, DANA, ShopeePay, LinkAja, QRIS), fee display (Gratis for transfer, Rp 2,500 for bank withdraw, Rp 1,000 for e-wallet withdraw), ETA display. Minimum amount validation (Rp 10,000 for IDR transfers) working on both backend and frontend. Fee estimation box shows when amount > 0.

backend_api_tests.reject_amount_below_minimum: PASSED - POST /api/transactions returns 400 for amount < 10,000 IDR
backend_api_tests.accept_amount_at_minimum: PASSED - POST /api/transactions returns 200 for amount = 10,000 IDR
backend_api_tests.accept_amount_above_minimum: PASSED - POST /api/transactions returns 200 for amount > 10,000 IDR
backend_api_tests.non_idr_transfer_no_minimum: PASSED - Non-IDR transfers bypass minimum check
backend_api_tests.withdraw_no_idr_minimum_check: PASSED - Withdraw type bypasses minimum check

frontend_ui_tests.min_hint_visible: PASSED - 'Min. Rp 10,000' hint text visible under Transfer input
frontend_ui_tests.amount_error_message: PASSED - Error 'Minimum pembelian Rp 10,000' shown when amount < 10,000
frontend_ui_tests.submit_button_disabled_on_error: PASSED - Submit button disabled when amount error exists
frontend_ui_tests.fee_estimation_visible: PASSED - Fee estimation box shows Estimasi, Fee jaringan, Total biaya
frontend_ui_tests.method_picker_opens_as_modal: PASSED - 'Pilih Metode Transfer' modal opens correctly
frontend_ui_tests.method_picker_3_categories: PASSED - Bank Transfer, E-Wallet, QRIS categories visible
frontend_ui_tests.method_picker_6_banks: PASSED - BCA, BNI, Mandiri, BRI, CIMB Niaga, Permata all present
frontend_ui_tests.method_picker_5_ewallets: PASSED - GoPay, OVO, DANA, ShopeePay, LinkAja all present
frontend_ui_tests.selected_method_card: PASSED - BCA shows as card with logo, 'Gratis', 'Instan'
frontend_ui_tests.withdraw_dest_bank_fee: PASSED - 6 bank destinations show Rp 2,500 fee
frontend_ui_tests.withdraw_dest_ewallet_fee: PASSED - 5 e-wallet destinations show Rp 1,000 fee
frontend_ui_tests.chatbot_widget_visible: PASSED - Made with Emergent widget visible on mobile
frontend_ui_tests.history_explorer_links: PASSED - 5 explorer links found with data-testid
frontend_ui_tests.copy_wallet_btn_code: VERIFIED - data-testid='copy-wallet-btn' present in code (shows when wallet connected)

method_picker_modal.details: Card-style modal with real bank logos, 3 categories (Bank Transfer, E-Wallet, QRIS), 6 banks, 5 e-wallets, 1 QRIS

minimum_amount_validation.details: Backend returns 400 for <10,000 IDR. Frontend shows error message and disables submit button.

fee_estimation_display.details: Shows Estimasi yang diterima, Fee jaringan (~Rp 5,000), Total biaya when amount > 0

withdraw_destination_fees.details: Bank: Rp 2,500 fee. E-Wallet: Rp 1,000 fee. QRIS: Rp 0 (Gratis)

explorer_links_in_history.details: External link icons on completed transactions with data-testid='tx-explorer-{id}'

copy_wallet_button.details: Button with data-testid='copy-wallet-btn' in ProfilePages.jsx line 128, shows when wallet connected

mobile_fullscreen_modal.details: Method picker is near-fullscreen (390x717px) on 390px mobile viewport
